title: Getting Started with glockr
code: library(glockr) scc_version() #> [1] "scc version 3.7.0"

title: Getting Started with glockr
text: scc() returns one row per language. run glockr package source . Results sorted code lines default. Change order sort: Valid sort values : "name", "files", "lines", "code", "comments", "blanks", "complexity".
code: scc(pkg_path) #> # A tibble: 4 × 10 #>   language files lines  code comments blanks #>   <chr>    <int> <int> <int>    <int>  <int> #> 1 R            4   644   534       26     84 #> 2 CSS          1   130   106        0     24 #> 3 HTML         1    41    37        0      4 #> 4 License      1     2     2        0      0 #> # ℹ 4 more variables: complexity <int>, #> #   weighted_complexity <dbl>, bytes <int>, #> #   uloc <int> scc(pkg_path, sort = "files") #> # A tibble: 4 × 10 #>   language files lines  code comments blanks #>   <chr>    <int> <int> <int>    <int>  <int> #> 1 R            4   644   534       26     84 #> 2 CSS          1   130   106        0     24 #> 3 HTML         1    41    37        0      4 #> 4 License      1     2     2        0      0 #> # ℹ 4 more variables: complexity <int>, #> #   weighted_complexity <dbl>, bytes <int>, #> #   uloc <int>

title: Getting Started with glockr
text: Use include_ext keep certain file types. Extensions case-insensitive match without leading dot. exclude_ext works opposite way — exclude one extensions: Pass character vector filter multiple extensions :
code: scc(pkg_path, include_ext = "r") #> # A tibble: 1 × 10 #>   language files lines  code comments blanks #>   <chr>    <int> <int> <int>    <int>  <int> #> 1 R            4   644   534       26     84 #> # ℹ 4 more variables: complexity <int>, #> #   weighted_complexity <dbl>, bytes <int>, #> #   uloc <int> scc(pkg_path, exclude_ext = "r") #> # A tibble: 3 × 10 #>   language files lines  code comments blanks #>   <chr>    <int> <int> <int>    <int>  <int> #> 1 CSS          1   130   106        0     24 #> 2 HTML         1    41    37        0      4 #> 3 License      1     2     2        0      0 #> # ℹ 4 more variables: complexity <int>, #> #   weighted_complexity <dbl>, bytes <int>, #> #   uloc <int> scc(pkg_path, include_ext = c("r", "css")) #> # A tibble: 2 × 10 #>   language files lines  code comments blanks #>   <chr>    <int> <int> <int>    <int>  <int> #> 1 R            4   644   534       26     84 #> 2 CSS          1   130   106        0     24 #> # ℹ 4 more variables: complexity <int>, #> #   weighted_complexity <dbl>, bytes <int>, #> #   uloc <int>

title: Getting Started with glockr
text: Complexity calculation adds small cost large trees. Pass no_complexity = TRUE skip :
code: scc(pkg_path, no_complexity = TRUE) #> # A tibble: 4 × 10 #>   language files lines  code comments blanks #>   <chr>    <int> <int> <int>    <int>  <int> #> 1 R            4   644   534       26     84 #> 2 CSS          1   130   106        0     24 #> 3 HTML         1    41    37        0      4 #> 4 License      1     2     2        0      0 #> # ℹ 4 more variables: complexity <int>, #> #   weighted_complexity <dbl>, bytes <int>, #> #   uloc <int>

title: Getting Started with glockr
text: scc_by_file() expands results one row per source file, adding filename, location, logical flags generated minified files. Filter just R source files tighter view:
code: scc_by_file(pkg_path) #> # A tibble: 7 × 12 #>   language filename  location lines  code comments #>   <chr>    <chr>     <chr>    <int> <int>    <int> #> 1 R        testthat… /Librar…     4     3        0 #> 2 R        test-bui… /Librar…   154   119        8 #> 3 R        test-par… /Librar…   238   212        5 #> 4 R        test-scc… /Librar…   248   200       13 #> 5 CSS      R.css     /Librar…   130   106        0 #> 6 HTML     00Index.… /Librar…    41    37        0 #> 7 License  LICENSE   /Librar…     2     2        0 #> # ℹ 6 more variables: blanks <int>, #> #   complexity <int>, weighted_complexity <dbl>, #> #   bytes <int>, generated <lgl>, minified <lgl> r_files <- scc_by_file(pkg_path, include_ext = "r") r_files[, c("filename", "lines", "code", "comments", "blanks", "complexity")] #> # A tibble: 4 × 6 #>   filename  lines  code comments blanks complexity #>   <chr>     <int> <int>    <int>  <int>      <int> #> 1 testthat…     4     3        0      1          0 #> 2 test-bui…   154   119        8     27         13 #> 3 test-par…   238   212        5     21         12 #> 4 test-scc…   248   200       13     35         11

title: Getting Started with glockr
text: ggplot2 tidyr can plot code / comment / blank split source file.
code: library(ggplot2) library(tidyr)  long <- pivot_longer(   r_files,   cols      = c(code, comments, blanks),   names_to  = "type",   values_to = "n_lines" ) long$type <- factor(long$type, levels = c("blanks", "comments", "code"))  ggplot(long, aes(x = n_lines, y = reorder(filename, n_lines), fill = type)) +   geom_col() +   scale_fill_manual(     values = c(code = "#2166ac", comments = "#92c5de", blanks = "#d1e5f0"),     labels = c(code = "Code", comments = "Comments", blanks = "Blanks")   ) +   labs(     title = "glockr R source — line composition",     x     = "Lines",     y     = NULL,     fill  = NULL   ) +   theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +   theme(legend.position = "bottom")

title: Getting Started with glockr
text: scc estimates cyclomatic complexity counting control-flow keywords (, , , etc.). complexity column raw total; weighted_complexity double rounded two decimal places.
code: r_files[order(-r_files$complexity),         c("filename", "code", "complexity", "weighted_complexity")] #> # A tibble: 4 × 4 #>   filename     code complexity weighted_complexity #>   <chr>       <int>      <int>               <dbl> #> 1 test-build…   119         13                0.11 #> 2 test-parse…   212         12                0.06 #> 3 test-scc.R    200         11                0.06 #> 4 testthat.R      3          0                0

title: Getting Started with glockr
text: uloc = TRUE asks scc count unique lines code (ULOC) — number distinct non-blank, non-comment lines. dryness = TRUE also computes ULOC additionally prints DRYness score console (extra effect returned tibble).
code: scc(pkg_path, uloc = TRUE) #> # A tibble: 4 × 10 #>   language files lines  code comments blanks #>   <chr>    <int> <int> <int>    <int>  <int> #> 1 R            4   644   534       26     84 #> 2 CSS          1   130   106        0     24 #> 3 HTML         1    41    37        0      4 #> 4 License      1     2     2        0      0 #> # ℹ 4 more variables: complexity <int>, #> #   weighted_complexity <dbl>, bytes <int>, #> #   uloc <int>

title: Getting Started with glockr
text: scc can detect files auto-generated minified. Detection opt-: pass gen = TRUE identify generated files min = TRUE identify minified files. Use min_gen = TRUE (-z) enable .
code: # identify generated files; generated column reflects detection scc_by_file(pkg_path, gen = TRUE)[, c("filename", "generated", "minified")] #> # A tibble: 7 × 3 #>   filename                 generated minified #>   <chr>                    <lgl>     <lgl> #> 1 testthat.R               FALSE     FALSE #> 2 test-build_args.R        FALSE     FALSE #> 3 test-parse_scc_json.R    FALSE     FALSE #> 4 test-scc.R               FALSE     FALSE #> 5 R.css                    FALSE     FALSE #> 6 00Index.html             FALSE     FALSE #> 7 LICENSE                  FALSE     FALSE

title: Getting Started with glockr
text: no_gen = TRUE (implies gen = TRUE) detects generated files drops results. no_min = TRUE minified files. no_min_gen = TRUE removes one pass.
code: scc(pkg_path, no_gen  = TRUE)   # drop generated files scc(pkg_path, no_min  = TRUE)   # drop minified files scc(pkg_path, no_min_gen = TRUE) # drop both

title: Getting Started with glockr
text: default scc looks "edit" "<auto-generated />" first lines file. Override generated_markers:
code: scc(pkg_path,     no_gen = TRUE,     generated_markers = c("GENERATED", "AUTO_BUILT"))

title: Getting Started with glockr
text: file considered minified average bytes per line exceeds threshold (default 255). Lower catch less-aggressively minified files:
code: scc(pkg_path, no_min = TRUE, min_gen_line_length = 100L)

title: Getting Started with glockr
text: no_duplicates = TRUE removes files whose content identical another file already counted, keeping one copy totals.
code: scc(pkg_path, no_duplicates = TRUE)

title: Getting Started with glockr
text: exclude_dir takes character vector directory names (full paths) skip entirely. scc defaults (.git, .hg, .svn) always applied; extends .
code: scc(pkg_path, exclude_dir = c("tests", "vignettes")) #> # A tibble: 4 × 10 #>   language files lines  code comments blanks #>   <chr>    <int> <int> <int>    <int>  <int> #> 1 R            4   644   534       26     84 #> 2 CSS          1   130   106        0     24 #> 3 HTML         1    41    37        0      4 #> 4 License      1     2     2        0      0 #> # ℹ 4 more variables: complexity <int>, #> #   weighted_complexity <dbl>, bytes <int>, #> #   uloc <int>

title: Getting Started with glockr
text: exclude_file skips files whose name (full path) matches element:
code: scc(pkg_path, exclude_file = c("LICENSE", "testthat.R"))

title: Getting Started with glockr
text: not_match accepts character vector regex patterns. file whose full path matches excluded. element becomes separate ---match flag.
code: scc(pkg_path, not_match = c("test_", "_generated"))

title: Getting Started with glockr
text: default scc skips symbolic links. Set include_symlinks = TRUE count (effect Windows).
code: scc(pkg_path, include_symlinks = TRUE)

title: Getting Started with glockr
text: scc respects .gitignore, .ignore, .gitmodules, .sccignore default. Use corresponding no_* flags disable : count_ignore = TRUE also counts ignore files source:
code: scc(pkg_path, no_gitignore  = TRUE)  # ignore .gitignore rules scc(pkg_path, no_ignore     = TRUE)  # ignore .ignore rules scc(pkg_path, no_gitmodule  = TRUE)  # ignore .gitmodules scc(pkg_path, no_scc_ignore = TRUE)  # ignore .sccignore scc(pkg_path, count_ignore = TRUE)

title: Getting Started with glockr
text: no_large = TRUE drops files exceed byte line-count threshold. defaults 1 000 000 bytes 40 000 lines; override large_byte_count large_line_count.
code: # skip files larger than 50 000 bytes or 1 000 lines scc(pkg_path, no_large = TRUE, large_byte_count = 50000L, large_line_count = 1000L)

title: Getting Started with glockr
text: count_as maps file extensions known scc languages using format "ext:language" (several mappings separated commas):
code: scc(pkg_path, count_as = "qmd:Markdown,rmd:Markdown")

title: Getting Started with glockr
text: remap_unknown inspects unrecognised files assigns language header string matches. remap_all every file, overriding extension-based detection.
code: scc(pkg_path, remap_unknown = "# R script:R") scc(pkg_path, remap_all     = "# R script:R")

title: Getting Started with glockr
text: scc() scc_by_file() accept character vector paths, can compare directories side side:
code: scc(c(   file.path(pkg_path, "R"),   file.path(pkg_path, "tests") )) #> # A tibble: 1 × 10 #>   language files lines  code comments blanks #>   <chr>    <int> <int> <int>    <int>  <int> #> 1 R            4   644   534       26     84 #> # ℹ 4 more variables: complexity <int>, #> #   weighted_complexity <dbl>, bytes <int>, #> #   uloc <int>

title: Getting Started with glockr
text: scc includes COCOMO 81 model estimates project effort cost SLOC. COCOMO output printed console (tabular mode) add columns returned tibble. sloccount_format = TRUE prints COCOMO block SLOCCount-compatible format (useful tooling parses output):
code: # suppress COCOMO lines from console output scc(pkg_path, no_cocomo = TRUE)  # customise the model scc(pkg_path,     avg_wage            = 120000L,       # annual salary in local currency     cocomo_project_type = "embedded",    # "organic", "semi-detached", or "embedded"     eaf                 = 1.1,           # effort adjustment factor     overhead            = 2.0,           # corporate overhead multiplier     currency_symbol     = "€")           # symbol shown in console output scc(pkg_path, sloccount_format = TRUE)

title: Getting Started with glockr
text: flags affect scc’s console/tabular output change tibble returned scc() scc_by_file().
code: scc(pkg_path, percent = TRUE, size_unit = "binary")

title: Getting Started with glockr
text: large repositories can control number worker goroutines queue sizes used scc. defaults work well cases; adjust profiling shows bottleneck.
code: scc(pkg_path,     directory_walker_job_workers = 4L,     file_process_job_workers     = 4L,     file_gc_count                = 5000L)

title: Getting Started with glockr
text: scc_languages() returns every language scc recognizes, along file extensions maps language. Search specific language:
code: langs <- scc_languages() nrow(langs) #> [1] 358  head(langs, 10) #> # A tibble: 10 × 2 #>    language     extensions #>    <chr>        <chr> #>  1 ABAP         abap #>  2 ABNF         abnf #>  3 ActionScript as #>  4 Ada          ada,adb,ads,pad #>  5 Agda         agda #>  6 Alchemist    crn #>  7 Alex         x #>  8 Algol 68     a68 #>  9 Alloy        als #> 10 Amber        ab langs[grepl("^R$", langs$language), ] #> # A tibble: 1 × 2 #>   language extensions #>   <chr>    <chr> #> 1 R        r

title: Authors and Citation
text: First Last. Author, maintainer.

title: Authors and Citation
text: Last F (2026). glockr: Count Lines Code Using 'scc'. R package version 0.1.0, https://github.com/mjfrigaard/glockr.
code: @Manual{,   title = {glockr: Count Lines of Code Using 'scc'},   author = {First Last},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.1.0},   url = {https://github.com/mjfrigaard/glockr}, }

what: Count Lines of Code Using scc
title: Count Lines of Code Using scc
text: goal glockr wrap scc code counter R package: “Goal fastest code counter possible, also perform COCOMO calculation like sloccount, LOCOMO estimation LLM-based development costs, estimate code complexity similar cyclomatic complexity calculators produce unique lines code DRYness metrics. short one tool rule .” project hugely inspired cloc R package boB Rudis

title: Count Lines of Code Using scc
text: can install development version glockr GitHub :
code: # install.packages("pak") pak::pak("mjfrigaard/glockr")

title: Count Lines of Code Using scc
text: Filter just R source files tighter view: scc estimates cyclomatic complexity counting control-flow keywords (, , , etc.). complexity column raw total; weighted_complexity divides lines code give per-line rate. scc_languages() returns every language scc recognizes, along file extensions maps language.
code: library(glockr)  pkg_path <- system.file(package = "glockr") scc_version() #> [1] "scc version 3.7.0" scc(pkg_path) #> # A tibble: 4 × 10 #>   language files lines  code comments blanks #>   <chr>    <int> <int> <int>    <int>  <int> #> 1 R            4   644   534       26     84 #> 2 CSS          1   130   106        0     24 #> 3 HTML         1    33    29        0      4 #> 4 License      1     2     2        0      0 #> # ℹ 4 more variables: complexity <int>, #> #   weighted_complexity <int>, bytes <int>, #> #   uloc <int> r_files <- scc_by_file(pkg_path, include_ext = "r") r_files[, c("filename", "lines", "code", "comments", "blanks", "complexity")] #> # A tibble: 4 × 6 #>   filename  lines  code comments blanks complexity #>   <chr>     <int> <int>    <int>  <int>      <int> #> 1 testthat…     4     3        0      1          0 #> 2 test-par…   238   212        5     21         12 #> 3 test-bui…   154   119        8     27         13 #> 4 test-scc…   248   200       13     35         11 r_files[order(-r_files$complexity),         c("filename", "code", "complexity", "weighted_complexity")] #> # A tibble: 4 × 4 #>   filename     code complexity weighted_complexity #>   <chr>       <int>      <int>               <int> #> 1 test-build…   119         13                   0 #> 2 test-parse…   212         12                   0 #> 3 test-scc.R    200         11                   0 #> 4 testthat.R      3          0                   0 langs <- scc_languages() nrow(langs) #> [1] 358 head(langs, 10) #> # A tibble: 10 × 2 #>    language     extensions      #>    <chr>        <chr>           #>  1 ABAP         abap            #>  2 ABNF         abnf            #>  3 ActionScript as              #>  4 Ada          ada,adb,ads,pad #>  5 Agda         agda            #>  6 Alchemist    crn             #>  7 Alex         x               #>  8 Algol 68     a68             #>  9 Alloy        als             #> 10 Amber        ab

what: Build the scc argument vector — build_args
title: Build the scc argument vector — build_args
text: Translates R-level options character vector CLI flags passed scc via processx::run().  output always starts c("--format", "json", "--sort", <sort>).

title: Build the scc argument vector — build_args
code: build_args(   sort = "code",   by_file = FALSE,   no_complexity = FALSE,   uloc = FALSE,   dryness = FALSE,   character = FALSE,   percent = FALSE,   size_unit = NULL,   verbose = FALSE,   debug = FALSE,   no_duplicates = FALSE,   binary = FALSE,   gen = FALSE,   no_gen = FALSE,   min = FALSE,   no_min = FALSE,   min_gen = FALSE,   no_min_gen = FALSE,   min_gen_line_length = NULL,   generated_markers = NULL,   include_ext = NULL,   exclude_ext = NULL,   exclude_dir = NULL,   exclude_file = NULL,   not_match = NULL,   count_as = NULL,   remap_all = NULL,   remap_unknown = NULL,   include_symlinks = FALSE,   no_large = FALSE,   large_byte_count = NULL,   large_line_count = NULL,   count_ignore = FALSE,   no_gitignore = FALSE,   no_gitmodule = FALSE,   no_ignore = FALSE,   no_scc_ignore = FALSE,   no_hborder = FALSE,   no_size = FALSE,   no_cocomo = FALSE,   avg_wage = NULL,   cocomo_project_type = NULL,   eaf = NULL,   overhead = NULL,   currency_symbol = NULL,   sloccount_format = FALSE,   directory_walker_job_workers = NULL,   file_gc_count = NULL,   file_list_queue_size = NULL,   file_process_job_workers = NULL,   file_summary_job_queue_size = NULL )

title: Build the scc argument vector — build_args
text: sort Column sort . One "name", "files", "lines", "code", "comments", "blanks", "complexity". Default "code". by_file Logical. Add ---file flag TRUE. no_complexity Logical. Skip complexity calculation (-c). uloc Logical. Calculate unique lines code (-u). dryness Logical. Calculate project DRYness; implies uloc (-). character Logical. Calculate max/mean characters per line (-m). percent Logical. Include percentage values tabular output (-p). effect returned tibble. size_unit Character. Set size unit display. One "si", "binary", "mixed", "xkcd-*" variant.  Default NULL (scc default "si"). verbose Logical. Verbose output (-v). debug Logical. Enable debug output. no_duplicates Logical. Remove duplicate files stats (-d). binary Logical. Disable binary-file detection. gen Logical. Identify generated files. no_gen Logical. Ignore generated files; implies gen. min Logical. Identify minified files. no_min Logical. Ignore minified files; implies min. min_gen Logical. Identify minified generated files (-z). no_min_gen Logical. Ignore minified generated files; implies min_gen. min_gen_line_length Integer. Bytes per average line threshold minified/generated detection. Default NULL (scc default 255). generated_markers Character vector. Strings head file mark generated. Passed comma-separated. Default NULL (scc defaults: c("edit", "<auto-generated />")). include_ext Character vector. Limit file extensions (comma-separated one flag, e.g. c("go", "java")) (-). exclude_ext Character vector. Ignore file extensions; overrides include_ext (-x). exclude_dir Character vector. Directories exclude. Default NULL (scc defaults: .git, .hg, .svn). exclude_file Character vector. Ignore files matching names (-n). Default NULL (scc defaults: lock files). not_match Character vector. Ignore files/directories whose path matches regex pattern. element becomes ---match flag (-M). count_as Character. Map extensions languages, e.g. "jsp:htm,chead:C Header". remap_all Character. Inspect every file remap string match, e.g. "-*- C++ -*-:C Header". remap_unknown Character. Like remap_all unknown-type files. include_symlinks Logical. Count symlinked files. no_large Logical. Ignore files exceeding large_byte_count / large_line_count. large_byte_count Integer. Byte threshold large-file removal. Default NULL (scc default 1000000). large_line_count Integer. Line threshold large-file removal. Default NULL (scc default 40000). count_ignore Logical. Count .gitignore / .ignore files. no_gitignore Logical. Disable .gitignore logic. no_gitmodule Logical. Disable .gitmodules logic. no_ignore Logical. Disable .ignore logic. no_scc_ignore Logical. Disable .sccignore logic. no_hborder Logical. Remove horizontal borders tabular output. effect returned tibble. no_size Logical. Remove size-calculation line tabular output. effect returned tibble. no_cocomo Logical. Remove COCOMO output tabular display. avg_wage Integer. Average annual wage COCOMO calculation. Default NULL (scc default 56286). cocomo_project_type Character. COCOMO model type: "organic", "semi-detached", "embedded", "custom,,b,c,d". Default NULL (scc default "organic"). eaf Numeric. Effort adjustment factor COCOMO. Default NULL (scc default 1). overhead Numeric. Corporate overhead multiplier COCOMO. Default NULL (scc default 2.4). currency_symbol Character. Symbol used COCOMO cost display. Default NULL (scc default "$"). sloccount_format Logical. Print SLOCCount-style COCOMO output. directory_walker_job_workers Integer. Workers directory walking. Default NULL (scc default 8). file_gc_count Integer. Files parsed GC enabled. Default NULL (scc default 10000). file_list_queue_size Integer. Queue size discovered files. Default NULL (scc default 12). file_process_job_workers Integer. Workers file-stat collection. Default NULL (scc default 12). file_summary_job_queue_size Integer. Queue size processed-file stats. Default NULL (scc default 12).

title: Build the scc argument vector — build_args
text: Character vector CLI arguments.

title: Build the scc argument vector — build_args
text: Flags affect scc's tabular display (---hborder, ---size, --percent, COCOMO formatting) accepted forwarded change returned tibble, wrapper always requests JSON output.

title: Build the scc argument vector — build_args
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ build_args("code", by_file = FALSE) build_args("lines", no_complexity = TRUE, include_ext = "r", by_file = TRUE) build_args("code", uloc = TRUE, exclude_dir = c("tests", "vignettes")) } # }

what: Return an empty tibble with the correct schema — empty_scc_tibble
title: Return an empty tibble with the correct schema — empty_scc_tibble
text: Used safe fallback scc produces output (e.g. empty directory files matching requested extensions).

title: Return an empty tibble with the correct schema — empty_scc_tibble
code: empty_scc_tibble(by_file = FALSE)

title: Return an empty tibble with the correct schema — empty_scc_tibble
text: by_file Logical. TRUE returns per-file schema (12 columns); FALSE (default) returns per-language schema (10 columns).

title: Return an empty tibble with the correct schema — empty_scc_tibble
text: zero-row tibble::tibble() whose columns types match output scc() (by_file = FALSE) scc_by_file() (by_file = TRUE).

title: Find the scc binary — find_scc
text: Locates scc executable system PATH stops informative error found.

title: Find the scc binary — find_scc
code: find_scc()

title: Find the scc binary — find_scc
text: Invisible character string: resolved path scc.

title: Find the scc binary — find_scc
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ find_scc() } # }

what: glockr: Count Lines of Code Using 'scc' — glockr-package
title: glockr: Count Lines of Code Using 'scc' — glockr-package
text: R wrapper around scc (Succinct Code Counter) command-line utility. Counts lines code, comments, blank lines across many languages, optional complexity metrics.

title: glockr: Count Lines of Code Using 'scc' — glockr-package
text: scc must installed system PATH. Download https://github.com/boyter/scc.

title: glockr: Count Lines of Code Using 'scc' — glockr-package
text: Maintainer: First Last mjfrigaard@pm.

what: Parse JSON output from scc into a tibble — parse_scc_json
title: Parse JSON output from scc into a tibble — parse_scc_json
text: Converts raw JSON written stdout scc --format json tibble::tibble(). Handles empty blank output returning zero-row tibble correct column schema via empty_scc_tibble().

title: Parse JSON output from scc into a tibble — parse_scc_json
code: parse_scc_json(json_text, by_file = FALSE)

title: Parse JSON output from scc into a tibble — parse_scc_json
text: json_text Character scalar: raw stdout captured scc. by_file Logical. TRUE unpacks per-file Files array inside language block; FALSE (default) returns one row per language.

title: Parse JSON output from scc into a tibble — parse_scc_json
text: tibble::tibble(). Column layout matches scc() by_file = FALSE scc_by_file() by_file = TRUE.

title: Parse JSON output from scc into a tibble — parse_scc_json
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ json <- processx::run("scc", c("--format", "json", "."))$stdout parse_scc_json(json)  json_by_file <- processx::run("scc", c("--format", "json", "--by-file", "."))$stdout parse_scc_json(json_by_file, by_file = TRUE) } # }

what: Count lines of code by language — scc
title: Count lines of code by language — scc
text: Runs scc one paths returns per-language summary.

title: Count lines of code by language — scc
code: scc(   path = ".",   sort = "code",   no_complexity = FALSE,   uloc = FALSE,   dryness = FALSE,   character = FALSE,   percent = FALSE,   size_unit = NULL,   verbose = FALSE,   debug = FALSE,   no_duplicates = FALSE,   binary = FALSE,   gen = FALSE,   no_gen = FALSE,   min = FALSE,   no_min = FALSE,   min_gen = FALSE,   no_min_gen = FALSE,   min_gen_line_length = NULL,   generated_markers = NULL,   include_ext = NULL,   exclude_ext = NULL,   exclude_dir = NULL,   exclude_file = NULL,   not_match = NULL,   count_as = NULL,   remap_all = NULL,   remap_unknown = NULL,   include_symlinks = FALSE,   no_large = FALSE,   large_byte_count = NULL,   large_line_count = NULL,   count_ignore = FALSE,   no_gitignore = FALSE,   no_gitmodule = FALSE,   no_ignore = FALSE,   no_scc_ignore = FALSE,   no_hborder = FALSE,   no_size = FALSE,   no_cocomo = FALSE,   avg_wage = NULL,   cocomo_project_type = NULL,   eaf = NULL,   overhead = NULL,   currency_symbol = NULL,   sloccount_format = FALSE,   directory_walker_job_workers = NULL,   file_gc_count = NULL,   file_list_queue_size = NULL,   file_process_job_workers = NULL,   file_summary_job_queue_size = NULL )

title: Count lines of code by language — scc
text: path Character vector file/directory paths analyse. Defaults current working directory ("."). sort Column sort . One "name", "files", "lines", "code", "comments", "blanks", "complexity". Default "code". no_complexity Logical. Skip complexity calculation (-c). uloc Logical. Calculate unique lines code (-u). dryness Logical. Calculate project DRYness; implies uloc (-). character Logical. Calculate max/mean characters per line (-m). percent Logical. Include percentage values tabular output (-p). effect returned tibble. size_unit Character. Set size unit display. One "si", "binary", "mixed", "xkcd-*" variant.  Default NULL (scc default "si"). verbose Logical. Verbose output (-v). debug Logical. Enable debug output. no_duplicates Logical. Remove duplicate files stats (-d). binary Logical. Disable binary-file detection. gen Logical. Identify generated files. no_gen Logical. Ignore generated files; implies gen. min Logical. Identify minified files. no_min Logical. Ignore minified files; implies min. min_gen Logical. Identify minified generated files (-z). no_min_gen Logical. Ignore minified generated files; implies min_gen. min_gen_line_length Integer. Bytes per average line threshold minified/generated detection. Default NULL (scc default 255). generated_markers Character vector. Strings head file mark generated. Passed comma-separated. Default NULL (scc defaults: c("edit", "<auto-generated />")). include_ext Character vector. Limit file extensions (comma-separated one flag, e.g. c("go", "java")) (-). exclude_ext Character vector. Ignore file extensions; overrides include_ext (-x). exclude_dir Character vector. Directories exclude. Default NULL (scc defaults: .git, .hg, .svn). exclude_file Character vector. Ignore files matching names (-n). Default NULL (scc defaults: lock files). not_match Character vector. Ignore files/directories whose path matches regex pattern. element becomes ---match flag (-M). count_as Character. Map extensions languages, e.g. "jsp:htm,chead:C Header". remap_all Character. Inspect every file remap string match, e.g. "-*- C++ -*-:C Header". remap_unknown Character. Like remap_all unknown-type files. include_symlinks Logical. Count symlinked files. no_large Logical. Ignore files exceeding large_byte_count / large_line_count. large_byte_count Integer. Byte threshold large-file removal. Default NULL (scc default 1000000). large_line_count Integer. Line threshold large-file removal. Default NULL (scc default 40000). count_ignore Logical. Count .gitignore / .ignore files. no_gitignore Logical. Disable .gitignore logic. no_gitmodule Logical. Disable .gitmodules logic. no_ignore Logical. Disable .ignore logic. no_scc_ignore Logical. Disable .sccignore logic. no_hborder Logical. Remove horizontal borders tabular output. effect returned tibble. no_size Logical. Remove size-calculation line tabular output. effect returned tibble. no_cocomo Logical. Remove COCOMO output tabular display. avg_wage Integer. Average annual wage COCOMO calculation. Default NULL (scc default 56286). cocomo_project_type Character. COCOMO model type: "organic", "semi-detached", "embedded", "custom,,b,c,d". Default NULL (scc default "organic"). eaf Numeric. Effort adjustment factor COCOMO. Default NULL (scc default 1). overhead Numeric. Corporate overhead multiplier COCOMO. Default NULL (scc default 2.4). currency_symbol Character. Symbol used COCOMO cost display. Default NULL (scc default "$"). sloccount_format Logical. Print SLOCCount-style COCOMO output. directory_walker_job_workers Integer. Workers directory walking. Default NULL (scc default 8). file_gc_count Integer. Files parsed GC enabled. Default NULL (scc default 10000). file_list_queue_size Integer. Queue size discovered files. Default NULL (scc default 12). file_process_job_workers Integer. Workers file-stat collection. Default NULL (scc default 12). file_summary_job_queue_size Integer. Queue size processed-file stats. Default NULL (scc default 12).

title: Count lines of code by language — scc
text: tibble::tibble() one row per language columns: language Programming language name. files Number files (integer). lines Total line count (integer). code Lines code (integer). comments Lines comments (integer). blanks Blank lines (integer). complexity Total cyclomatic complexity score (integer). weighted_complexity Complexity weighted lines code (double, rounded 2 decimal places). bytes File size bytes (integer). uloc Unique lines code; 0 unless uloc dryness TRUE (integer).

title: Count lines of code by language — scc
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ scc() scc("~/myproject", sort = "lines", no_complexity = TRUE) scc(".", uloc = TRUE, exclude_dir = c("tests", "vignettes")) scc(".", no_gen = TRUE, no_min = TRUE, no_duplicates = TRUE) } # }

what: Count lines of code per file — scc_by_file
title: Count lines of code per file — scc_by_file
text: Runs scc one paths ---file flag returns one row per source file.

title: Count lines of code per file — scc_by_file
code: scc_by_file(   path = ".",   sort = "code",   no_complexity = FALSE,   uloc = FALSE,   dryness = FALSE,   character = FALSE,   percent = FALSE,   size_unit = NULL,   verbose = FALSE,   debug = FALSE,   no_duplicates = FALSE,   binary = FALSE,   gen = FALSE,   no_gen = FALSE,   min = FALSE,   no_min = FALSE,   min_gen = FALSE,   no_min_gen = FALSE,   min_gen_line_length = NULL,   generated_markers = NULL,   include_ext = NULL,   exclude_ext = NULL,   exclude_dir = NULL,   exclude_file = NULL,   not_match = NULL,   count_as = NULL,   remap_all = NULL,   remap_unknown = NULL,   include_symlinks = FALSE,   no_large = FALSE,   large_byte_count = NULL,   large_line_count = NULL,   count_ignore = FALSE,   no_gitignore = FALSE,   no_gitmodule = FALSE,   no_ignore = FALSE,   no_scc_ignore = FALSE,   no_hborder = FALSE,   no_size = FALSE,   no_cocomo = FALSE,   avg_wage = NULL,   cocomo_project_type = NULL,   eaf = NULL,   overhead = NULL,   currency_symbol = NULL,   sloccount_format = FALSE,   directory_walker_job_workers = NULL,   file_gc_count = NULL,   file_list_queue_size = NULL,   file_process_job_workers = NULL,   file_summary_job_queue_size = NULL )

title: Count lines of code per file — scc_by_file
text: tibble::tibble() one row per file columns: language Programming language name. filename File name (basename). location Full file path. lines Total line count (integer). code Lines code (integer). comments Lines comments (integer). blanks Blank lines (integer). complexity Cyclomatic complexity score (integer). weighted_complexity Complexity weighted lines code (double, rounded 2 decimal places). bytes File size bytes (integer). generated TRUE file auto-generated (logical). minified TRUE file minified (logical).

title: Count lines of code per file — scc_by_file
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ scc_by_file() scc_by_file("~/myproject", include_ext = "R") scc_by_file(".", no_gen = TRUE, no_min = TRUE) } # }
